section.title: Quick Fixes
section.p: If you hit an error in the terminal, check this table before asking Copilot.

row.entry: Terminal says conda: command not found
Miniconda isn't in your PATH, or you restarted VS Code.
On Windows, close the normal terminal and open the Anaconda Prompt from your Start Menu, OR ensure you checked "Add to PATH" during installation.
Terminal says ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'spacy'
You forgot to activate your virtual environment.
Run conda activate nlp-course. You should see (nlp-course) at the start of your terminal line.
A white dot appears next to your file name at the top of VS Code.
Press Ctrl + S (Windows) or Cmd + S (Mac). Python cannot run code you haven't saved!
